achievements: BlaBlaCar-style premium desktop web optimization across all 5 key screens: search results, ride details, publish form, my rides dashboard, and public driver profile.
Implemented responsive dual-pane (double column) layout using dynamic useWindowDimensions hooks, maintaining full cross-platform compatibility.
Added sticky reservation panels and public driver stats cards for high-conversion SaaS presentation on desktop.
Fixed critical React Rules of Hooks violation in driver profile page by shifting hook declarations to the top.
Resolved null driver ID reference on mock/seed rides by implementing a smart fallback to the test admin UUID, preventing blank page errors.
Corrected JSX structural layout mismatches on rides dashboard compilation.
Eliminated web browser text input focus rings using outline-none styles for absolute visual purity.
Created custom uppercase location formatter rendering selected locations on two clean lines without wrapping using numberOfLines={1}.
Wrapped desktop authentication panels in ScrollView to prevent upper elements from being clipped on low-height screens.
Executed comprehensive end-to-end browser automation tests verifying error-free compilation and navigation on desktop views.
